name: gcp
description: Google Cloud Platform management via the gcloud CLI. Ask Claude to run any gcloud command — Compute Engine, GKE, Cloud Storage, Cloud Run, IAM, and more.

tools.name: gcloud
tools.description:
Run any gcloud CLI command. Pass all arguments after 'gcloud' as an array.

Examples:
- List VM instances: ["compute", "instances", "list", "--format", "table"]
- GKE clusters: ["container", "clusters", "list"]
- Cloud Storage buckets: ["storage", "ls"]
- Cloud Run services: ["run", "services", "list", "--platform", "managed"]
- IAM policies: ["projects", "get-iam-policy", "my-project"]
- Describe instance: ["compute", "instances", "describe", "my-vm", "--zone", "us-central1-a"]
